cues.text: 第十六課：他總是笑著跟人說話
cues.tr: Lesson 16: He Always Talks to People with a Smile

cues.text: 場景： 小李和小仁在一間咖啡廳聊著天。
cues.tr: Scene: Xiao Li and Xiao Ren are chatting in a café.

cues.text: 小仁，你有沒有注意到我們公司新來的那個年輕人？
cues.tr: Xiao Li: Xiao Ren, have you noticed the new young man in our company?
cues.speaker: 小李

cues.text: 嗯，我注意到了。他總是笑著跟人說話，看起來很熱情。
cues.tr: Xiao Ren: Yes, I have. He always talks to people with a smile; he seems very enthusiastic.
cues.speaker: 小仁

cues.text: 對啊，而且他對每個人都很有禮貌，真的讓人很舒服。
cues.tr: Xiao Li: Yeah, and he’s polite to everyone, which makes people feel very comfortable.
cues.speaker: 小李

cues.text: 是啊，他越來越受大家的喜歡了。你知道他是哪裡人嗎？
cues.tr: Xiao Ren: That’s true. He’s becoming more and more popular. Do you know where he’s from?
cues.speaker: 小仁

cues.text: 聽說是北方來的。他很認真，工作做得特別細心。
cues.tr: Xiao Li: I heard he’s from the north. He’s very serious and meticulous in his work.
cues.speaker: 小李

cues.text: 難怪他每次都努力地學習新技能，看起來很上進呢。
cues.tr: Xiao Ren: No wonder he’s always working hard to learn new skills. He seems very ambitious.
cues.speaker: 小仁

cues.text: 是啊，而且每次遇到困難，他還是笑著面對，不容易啊。
cues.tr: Xiao Li: Exactly, and even when he faces difficulties, he still smiles through them. That’s not easy.
cues.speaker: 小李

cues.text: 我覺得他這種態度很好，熱情又努力，真是個好榜樣。
cues.tr: Xiao Ren: I think his attitude is great—enthusiastic and hardworking. He’s truly a role model.
cues.speaker: 小仁

cues.text: 沒錯！像他這樣年輕又熱情的人，以後一定會有很好的發展。
cues.tr: Xiao Li: Right! Young and passionate people like him are bound to have a bright future.
cues.speaker: 小李

cues.text: 是啊！有志者事竟成，我也很看好他的。
cues.tr: Xiao Ren: Yes! Where there’s a will, there’s a way. I really have high hopes for him.
cues.speaker: 小仁

cues.text: 我們可以一起學習他的工作態度。
cues.tr: Xiao Li: We can learn from his work attitude together.
cues.speaker: 小李

cues.text: 對，我覺得我們也應該像他一樣，更努力工作。
cues.tr: Xiao Ren: I agree. We should also work harder, just like him.
cues.speaker: 小仁

cues.text: 不光是工作，他的生活也很有規律。他每天都運動，保持健康。
cues.tr: Xiao Li: Not just his work, but his lifestyle is also very disciplined. He exercises every day to stay healthy.
cues.speaker: 小李

cues.text: 我覺得他這種生活方式很好，有機會可以向他學習。
cues.tr: Xiao Ren: I think his lifestyle is great. We should learn from him if we get the chance.
cues.speaker: 小仁

cues.text: 對！他真的是我們的好榜樣。我想多觀察他，看他是怎麼安排時間的。
cues.tr: Xiao Li: Definitely! He’s a great role model for us. I’d like to observe him more and see how he manages his time.
cues.speaker: 小李

cues.text: 是啊，跟他在一起，會覺得自己也越來越有動力。
cues.tr: Xiao Ren: Yes, being around him makes you feel more motivated.
cues.speaker: 小仁

cues.text: 不過啊，他也不是一直都笑著的呢。有時候遇到比較大的壓力，他也是會認真起來的。
cues.tr: Xiao Li: However, he’s not always smiling. When he faces greater pressures, he becomes serious.
cues.speaker: 小李

cues.text: 看來他真的很努力！他這種認真工作的態度讓人佩服。
cues.tr: Xiao Ren: It seems he’s really hardworking! His serious attitude towards work is admirable.
cues.speaker: 小仁

cues.text: 是啊，大家都覺得他越來越棒了。
cues.tr: Xiao Li: Absolutely, everyone thinks he’s getting better and better.
cues.speaker: 小李

cues.text: 希望我們也能像他一樣，變得越來越好！
cues.tr: Xiao Ren: I hope we can also improve and become better, just like him!
cues.speaker: 小仁
